checks.label: Node.js v24.13.1
checks.detail: Requires Node.js 20 or newer for the OSS v1 toolchain.

checks.label: npm 11.8.0
checks.detail: Requires npm 11 or newer for the canonical workspace flow.

checks.label: git version 2.52.0.windows.1
checks.detail: Git is required for repo mapping, worktrees, and public release flow.
checks.action: Install Git and rerun the release doctor.

checks.label: Git user.name: Dante Ricardo
checks.detail: Public pushes should use your real name so GitHub attribution and release history are correct.

checks.label: Git user.email: dantericardo88@users.noreply.github.com
checks.detail: Public pushes should use the email address linked to your GitHub account.

checks.label: origin remote: https://github.com/dantericardo88/dantecode.git
checks.detail: A remote is required before the first public push and Actions validation run.
checks.action: Create the GitHub repo in the browser, then run `git remote add origin <repo-url>`.

checks.label: Working tree has 169 uncommitted path(s).
checks.detail: This is fine during development, but review or commit the release set before pushing.
checks.action: Run `git status --short` and commit the release-ready changes you want to publish.

checks.label: gh CLI is installed and authenticated.
checks.detail: GitHub CLI is optional. Browser repo creation plus `git push` is still the default fallback.
checks.action: Run `gh auth login` if you want CLI-based repo and release operations.

checks.label: GitHub CI for 6b9b62cd1bc4 concluded failure.
checks.detail: Public release proof should include a successful CI run for the same commit being evaluated.
checks.action: Push the current commit, wait for ci.yml to finish green, then rerun the release doctor.

checks.label: Built CLI artifact exists.
checks.detail: The smoke checks and source install path expect a built CLI.
checks.action: Run `npm run build` before the full release sweep.

checks.label: Built core runtime artifact is missing.
checks.detail: The live provider smoke check expects the built core runtime.
checks.action: Run `npm run build` before `npm run smoke:provider -- --require-provider`.

checks.label: GitHub Actions workflow files present.
checks.detail: CI and publish automation are versioned with the repo and ready after the first push.

checks.label: All readiness artifacts are fresh (same commit)
Readiness: private-ready (commit 6b9b62cd1bc4).
checks.detail: Repo proof is private-ready. Public-ready still requires: Gate "liveProvider" must pass. Current status: unknown.; Release doctor blocker: GitHub CI for 6b9b62cd1bc4 concluded failure.; Release doctor blocker: No provider credentials detected for the live model-router smoke test.
checks.action: Close the remaining public-ready requirements, then rerun `npm run release:sync`.

checks.label: README quickstart proof is present but still has unresolved follow-up actions.
checks.detail: Same-commit live provider receipt is missing or unknown. Generate it with real credentials.
checks.action: Run `npm run release:prove-quickstart` to generate same-commit quickstart proof.

checks.label: No provider credentials detected for the live model-router smoke test.
checks.detail: A real provider run is still required to complete external acceptance beyond local mocks.
checks.action: Set GROK_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or OPENAI_API_KEY, then rerun the provider smoke test.

checks.label: No npm publish auth token detected locally or in GitHub Actions secrets.
checks.detail: Publishing the CLI and core packages requires the `NPM_TOKEN` GitHub Actions secret for the public workflow.
checks.action: Add the `NPM_TOKEN` GitHub Actions secret before running the publish workflow.

checks.label: VSCE_PAT is not set locally or in GitHub Actions secrets.
checks.detail: The preview extension publish job requires `VSCE_PAT` only when you want Marketplace distribution for the preview surface. It is not required for CLI Public GA.
checks.action: Add the `VSCE_PAT` GitHub Actions secret before publishing the preview extension.
